errors.invalidCredential: Invalid credential. Please check your email and password
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already in use.
errors.weakPassword: Password should be at least 6 characters.
errors.accessDenied: Access denied. Only business managers can access this app.

unassigned.title: Access Restricted
unassigned.description: You aren't assigned to any businesses yet

autoLogin.title: Logging you in...
autoLogin.description: Please wait while we securely log you into your account.

noData.title: No data available
noData.description: The selected timeline has no data yet. Try selecting a different range.

kpis.title: Key Performance Indicators
kpis.description: Shows your most important business metrics at a glance: total revenue, number of orders, average order value, and cancellation rate. Each metric includes a percentage change comparing the current period to the previous period.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.description: AI-generated observations about your business performance, highlighting best-selling items, customer retention rates, and top-performing categories.

salesTrends.title: Sales Trends
salesTrends.description: A line chart showing your revenue and order volume over time. Toggle between revenue and orders to track how your sales are trending across the selected period.

topItems.title: Top Selling Items
topItems.description: Your best-performing menu items ranked by revenue. Shows each item's quantity sold and growth percentage compared to the previous period.

categoryPerf.title: Category Performance
categoryPerf.description: Breakdown of revenue by menu category. Bars show each category's contribution to total revenue, with status indicators for performance level.

customerAnalytics.title: Customer Analytics
customerAnalytics.description: Overview of your customer base including total customer count, returning customer percentage, and your top customer by order value.

operationsPerf.title: Operations Performance
operationsPerf.description: Tracks operational efficiency metrics like average preparation time, delivery time, and order completion rate compared to targets.

deliveryAreas.title: Top Delivery Areas
deliveryAreas.description: Geographic breakdown of where your orders are being delivered, showing order volume and percentage share for each area.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.description: Distribution of orders by payment method, showing the percentage and order count for each method used by your customers.

businessScore.title: Business Health Score
businessScore.description: An overall health score for your business based on revenue growth, customer retention, and operational efficiency. Includes strengths, areas to improve, and trend indicators.

businessScore.title: Business Health Score
businessScore.revenueIncrease: Revenue increased by {growth}% compared to previous period
businessScore.lowRetention: Low customer retention rate. Consider loyalty programs.
businessScore.lowCompletion: Order completion rate is below target.
businessScore.slowPrepTime: Preparation time is slower than expected.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your app preferences
Settings.themeDescription: Toggle between light and dark mode

Metadata.title: OrderSync | Home
Metadata.description: Track your restaurant performance and analytics
